Bash(python3 -c "
from src.directions import DirectionResults, compute_contrastive_direction
import numpy as np
pairwise = {
    'self_vs_expert': np.random.randn\(3, 10\).astype\(np.float32\),
    'self_vs_average': np.random.randn\(3, 10\).astype\(np.float32\),
    'self_vs_animal': np.random.randn\(3, 10\).astype\(np.float32\),
    'self_vs_object': np.random.randn\(3, 10\).astype\(np.float32\),
}
for k in pairwise:
    for l in range\(3\):
        pairwise[k][l] /= np.linalg.norm\(pairwise[k][l]\)
cd, cc = compute_contrastive_direction\(pairwise\)
print\(f'directions.py OK - contrastive dir shape: {cd.shape}, consistency: {cc}'\)
" && python3 -c "

X_test = np.random.randn\(20, 50\).astype\(np.float32\)
Xr, Xt, n = _inlp_project_out\(X_train, y_train, X_test, max_iter=3\)
print\(f'specificity.py OK - INLP removed {n} directions, shape: {Xr.shape}'\)
